title: Same; sale under first process where provisional or definitive syndic appointed
doc_html:
§4110.  Same; sale under first process where provisional or definitive syndic appointed

In all cases when executory process has issued and a surrender has been made and a provisional or definitive syndic has been appointed, the sale under the first process shall be effected the same as if no surrender has been made or syndic appointed.
doc_text:
§4110.  Same; sale under first process where provisional or definitive syndic appointed
In all cases when executory process has issued and a surrender has been made and a provisional or definitive syndic has been appointed, the sale under the first process shall be effected the same as if no surrender has been made or syndic appointed.
